# Vendored Standard Schema Spec

This directory contains a vendored copy of the Standard Schema type definitions used by this project.

Source:
- https://github.com/standard-schema/standard-schema
- File: `packages/spec/src/index.ts`

Retrieved:
- 2026-03-06

Notes:
- Vendored intentionally instead of installing `@standard-schema/spec`.
- Keep this file in sync manually with upstream when needed.
